text:
Abstract:

Business ethics as one of the main components in management policy is aimed at creating a competitive and sustainable organization by means of management planning, with the implementation of full transparency and integrity and uniformity in company culture. This study aimed at knowing and understanding how the application of business ethics at PT. Nesia Pan Pacific is conducted and has an effect on employee productivity. The research methodology used is by conducting a direct observation and deep interview to employees in order to determine the impact of the ethics applied in the company on working performance and conditions in the workplace. The result obtained shows that strong business ethics in accordance with the principles of accountability, integrity, transparency and social responsibility carried out in an organization has an influence on increasing productivity of works carried out by employees. It is the case that through the implementation of business ethics in accordance with rules carried out in an organization has a large influence on developing a spirit among employees at work in order to improve work productivity carried out by all employees. Furthermore the application of business ethics on all components of companies has a large influence on developing the confidence of employees while at the same time loyalty to an organization for as long as they are still alive; and the overall work efficiency and level of employee resignations within an organization is high. Thus it can be concluded that companies must comply with rules of business ethics on the grounds of ethical values which will eventually have an influence on increasing employee productivity in the long run while also in increasing a good image of the company.
